Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 185 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Attention Residuals 222 upvotes, 29 comments
  3. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 37 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 145 upvotes, 19 comments
  5. Mamba-3 247 upvotes, 48 comments
  6. Ghostling 290 upvotes, 60 comments
  7. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 380 upvotes, 113 comments
  8. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 96 upvotes, 27 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 95 upvotes, 28 comments
  10. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 129 upvotes, 47 comments
  11. Some Things Just Take Time 223 upvotes, 92 comments
  12. Molly guard in reverse 185 upvotes, 76 comments
  13. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1135 upvotes, 556 comments
  14. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 22 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 209 upvotes, 104 comments
  16. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 271 upvotes, 176 comments
  17. 404 Deno CEO not found 194 upvotes, 132 comments
  18. Books of the Century by Le Monde 54 upvotes, 30 comments
  19. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 106 upvotes, 69 comments
  20. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 11 upvotes, 3 comments
  21. Invisalign Became the Biggest User of 3D Printers 36 upvotes, 19 comments
  22. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 402 upvotes, 318 comments
  23. Senior European journalist suspended over AI-generated quotes 59 upvotes, 38 comments
  24. Why Some Men Struggle to Keep Up with Friendships 12 upvotes, 4 comments
  25. Passengers who refuse to use headphones can now be kicked off United flights 109 upvotes, 102 comments
  26. I Built a Spy Satellite Simulator in a Browser. Here's What I Learned 8 upvotes, 3 comments
  27. The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020) 43 upvotes, 37 comments
  28. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 192 upvotes, 219 comments
  29. How we give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster 48 upvotes, 57 comments
  30. Iran launched unsuccessful attack on UK's Diego Garcia 84 upvotes, 178 comments

Last generated 3:00am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
